body_transformation: Diglett's small, burrowing silhouette remains intact with its narrow elongated head and two clawed forelimbs extended forward. Its dull brown body transforms into smooth, electric blue scales with vibrant yellow lightning bolt patterns tracing its spine and limbs. The soil texture is replaced with a sleek, metallic sheen, while its base ground effect shifts to glowing neon green circuit lines. Tiny sparking fur tips appear at the ends of its claws and along its head, maintaining its low crawling stance without structural changes.
signature_feature: Spine: jagged electric blue scales with neon yellow lightning bolt patterns and glowing circuit lines.
